    Given console.redhat.com is accessible

     When user U1 selects the item "OpenShift" from the left menu on console.redhat.com

      And the left menu should contian at least these items
          | Left menu item              |
          | Clusters                    |
          | Overview                    |
          | Releases                    |
          | Downloads                   |
          | Subscriptions               |
          | Cost Management             |
          | Support Cases               |
          | Cluster Manager Feedback    |
          | Red Hat Marketplace         |
          | Documentation               |

      And button "Create cluster" should be made visible

          | My profile       |
          | User preferences |

Given user USER1 is part of account (organization) ACCOUNT1

When user looks at Open Cluster Management main page
Then menu on the left side should be displayed
And the left menu might contain these top level items
| Left menu item      | Required for this test |
| Home                | no                     |
| Infrastructure      | no                     |
| Applications        | no                     |
| Governance          | no                     |
| Credential          | no                     |

| Clusters            | yes                    |
| Bare metal assets   | no                     |
| Automation          | no                     |
When user select "Clusters" menu item from this sub-menu

| Tab name            | Required for this test |
| Managed clusters    | yes                    |
| Cluster sets        | no                     |
| Cluster pods        | no                     |
| Discovered clusters | no                     |

| Distribution version                      |
